milestones.name: Runtime Spine
milestones.objective: 稳定 root SDK defaults、runtime identity、message/event/step/export/import/checkpoint/resume 基础契约，让 graph 可以在稳定 step 边界恢复。

milestones.name: Model Spine
milestones.objective: 提供 provider-neutral model contract、provider registry/router、route set、fallback decision、middleware、fake provider 和 OpenAI-compatible reference adapter。
open_items: 真实 OpenAI/Anthropic provider adapter 作为外部 gopact-adapters-model 仓库优先目标；OpenAI-compatible generic adapter 继续通过 provider profile 覆盖 GLM/BigModel、Z.AI、Volcengine Ark、Alibaba DashScope/Model Studio、OpenRouter 和企业网关；models.dev catalog adapter 可作为能力/价格/上下文窗口 hint，但不能替代真实 conformance
生产级 provider 健康检查、预算策略和评测治理继续由 adapter/plugin 深化

milestones.name: Tool and Sandbox Spine
milestones.objective: 提供 visible/deferred tool registry、artifact、sandbox、policy、tool middleware、retry/effect/replay 和 verification evidence 第一片。
open_items: 生产级 tool exactly-once ledger 仍需持久化 adapter、跨 worker 冲突处理和外部 commit store conformance 接入。
Secret、prompt-injection 与 sandbox profile 仍需生产级后端、继承授权模型、classifier 实现和策略调参。

milestones.name: Integration and Extensibility Spine
milestones.objective: 提供 memory、skill、MCP、A2A、TurnLoop、middleware、plugin、channel/transfer、policy/redaction 和外部集成路线第一片。
open_items: MCP/A2A production transport、Lark 真实 client/OAuth、A2UI renderer、AG-UI WebSocket/plugin 仍在外部仓库路线中
真实 LangSmith SDK、LangGraph exporter policy/redaction 深化和插件级治理仍需外部 plugin/adapter 完成

milestones.name: Agent Template and Evidence Layer
milestones.objective: 在原子能力之上验证 ReAct、Agent-as-Tool、Dev Agent template contract、trajectory golden、verification evidence、entropy audit 和 reviewer/release gate。
open_items: self-bootstrap workflow release evidence 仍需更多真实场景，覆盖 template-specific golden trajectory、Dev Agent workflow process record 和 step export/import 场景。
ReAct deferred memory 仍需 durable queue adapter、distributed leasing、生产调度策略、真实 retry/DLQ storage 和高级 memory 压缩/合并策略。
review、CI、release gate 与 governance evidence 仍需真实 model review 评测治理、CI provider 拉取/重跑/secret 治理和人工 release gate 生产化。

milestones.name: Production Hardening
milestones.objective: 让 core SDK、public API、schema、CI、release gate、文档、迁移策略和外部扩展仓库达到可长期依赖的状态。

evidence_records.notes: GitHub Actions run 28345830731 completed successfully on main for test: harden provider roadmap targets; run steps Check whitespace, Test, Race, Vet, Lint, Coverage, Examples, and Security were all success.

Remote audit historically showed ready=11 / not_ready=0 / missing=0 for the legacy private external scaffold repositories. That evidence is now retained as migration history; internal/extensionscaffold.RecordRemoteStatusCheck can still record observed remote readiness reports as external_repository_readiness evidence, and internal/extensionscaffold.RecordRemoteCIRunSetCheck can still record observed Actions runs as the legacy external-ci:gopact-ai cross-repository ci_gate evidence.

open_items: extension 生态 readiness 与历史迁移责任需要由 release gate、远端 CI evidence 和周期性审计持续防回归。
v1 migration 仍需 release 前按 v1-migration-plan.json 执行最终 gate，确认 public API、repository boundary、migration guide 与 extension ecosystem CI evidence 同步。

required_gates: human or reviewer decision before release
